docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HICKMAN, JABAR AS TO DEFENDANT ANDAM, AMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ANDAM, AMA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT HICKMAN, JABAR $2,555.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
